heading: Strategy and execution — by the same person
subhead: Most transformation fails in the handover between strategy deck and delivery team. I do both — discovery, design, migration, rollout, and adoption. No handoff gap.

approach.title: Cut EUR 500k+ in license spend
approach.desc: Merged 3 enterprise processes and retired legacy tooling at NTT Ltd. — savings hit the P&L in the same fiscal year.

approach.title: Run SAP S/4HANA ↔ PEGA moves
approach.desc: Future-state design, rating & metering standardization, variable billing operationalization at S.W.I.F.T. and NTT Ltd.

approach.title: Free 15+ FTE via automation
approach.desc: Ticket-quality QA automation at BT — USD 100k+/yr; 20% decreased waiting time on monthly invoicing at NTT.

approach.title: Drive 21% adoption uplift
approach.desc: Change management on PEGA workflow rollouts at BT — turned rollout into actual daily usage, not shelfware.
